title: FUAWK Cobblemon Reborn
description: A Cobblemon Modpack with extended terrain generation and structures. Focused on Cobblemon, with elements of adventure and technology.
body:
Explore the limitless world of Cobblemon with the FUAWK Community's flair! Explore the vast world of Cobblemon, with new structures to explore and conquor, as well some technology to keep the clinks clanking.

---

- **Expanded Terrain Generation.** More biomes and unique places to explore with Terralith, Tectonic, and Wythers Expanded Ecosphere. Explore countless new biomes, and catch cobblemon within. - **Fight alongside your Cobblemon.** The world of FUAWK Cobblemon is home to both minecraft mobs, and Cobblemon. However your Cobblemon are not defenseless, and can help you in battle! - **Legendary Structures.** Discover new structures scattered throughout the land. Including dungeons for you to explore, as well as structures from the world of Pokemon. - **New Decorations and Furniture.** Build with many new types of furniture including many new items to spice up your home. New blocks from Rechisled allow you to add some spice to vanilla exteriors as well. - **Farm, Breed, and Build.** Farmer's Delight introduces new crops and recipies, while Cooking for Blockheads allows you to construct a proper kitchen to prepare meals for you, or your Cobblemon. Breed the perfect Cobblemon, or just let them roam about. - **Automation.** Automate farming and crafting through the use of Create and addons. Automate specifically the crafting of potions, vitamins, and pokeballs so you can focus on your cobblemon advantures. - **Storage Solutions.** Engineer high tech storage with Applied Energistics, or keep it simple and don a traveler's backpack. Cobblemon aren't the only things that can be stored in a PC! - **Ride your Cobblemon.** Travel with ease through the land, water, or air on the back of your trusty Cobblemon. - **Teach Moves.** Teach your cobblemon moves using TMs and TRs. You will find these throughout the world, or you can trade with villagers. - **Mega Evolution.** Mega evolve your Cobblemon, and utilize many of the other gimmics, with Cobblemon: Mega Showdown.
